parameters.query:
=SELECT doc_id, chunk_type, page, content_text, caption, asset_path, meta,
       1 - (embedding <=> '{{$json.embedding_vec}}'::vector) AS score
FROM rag_chunks
WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL
  AND embedding <=> '{{$json.embedding_vec}}'::vector < {{ $env.VECTOR_DISTANCE_THRESHOLD || '0.5' }}
  AND (
    {{$json.hasDocFilter}} = false
    OR doc_id IN (
      SELECT doc_id FROM rag_docs
      WHERE filename ILIKE '%' || '{{$json.docFilter}}' || '%'
    )
  )
ORDER BY embedding <=> '{{$json.embedding_vec}}'::vector
LIMIT 6;
